meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about a lack of portfolio. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build high-value, revenue-ready SaaS apps in hours.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; founders don't need a gallery, they need a revenue-generating MVP. By leveraging the Antigravity project template combined with Claude Code, you can architect, scaffold, and deploy a market-validated SaaS application in under 48 hours, proving your technical execution capabilities to investors and customers.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank repository, the silence of a missing portfolio echoing louder than your ambition. The market doesn't care about your resume; it cares about your ability to solve high-friction problems. Every hour spent agonizing over your lack of 'past work' is an hour where your competitor is capturing your market share.

The Antigravity project template is the ultimate forcing function. It strips away the boilerplate bloat that kills velocity, allowing you to move directly from business logic to production-ready infrastructure. With Claude Code as your co-pilot, you aren't just writing code—you are orchestrating a technical symphony that turns business requirements into revenue-generating assets.

steps.title: Architecting the Revenue Engine
steps.description: Define the core problem you are solving before writing a single line of code. We focus on the 'Must-Have' feature that solves the primary pain point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a SaaS project structure using the Antigravity template, specifically configured for a B2B productivity tool with authentication and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Database Schema Optimization
steps.description: Design a lean schema that prioritizes data integrity and rapid querying to ensure your MVP feels lightning-fast from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema optimized for high-read, low-latency user data management, including tables for profiles, subscriptions, and core feature entities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file schema.prisma --prompt 'Add RLS-enabled user and subscription models'

steps.title: Implementing High-Conversion UI
steps.description: Use the template's component library to build a landing page that converts visitors into waitlist signups immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-converting hero section component using Tailwind CSS, including a clear value proposition and a primary CTA button.

steps.title: Integrating Payment Rails
steps.description: Connect Stripe to your Antigravity template to ensure you can accept revenue from the moment you hit deploy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Stripe webhook handler and checkout session logic within the Antigravity API routes.

steps.title: Deployment and Validation
steps.description: Push your code to production and perform a live smoke test to ensure your infrastructure is ready for real users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Prepare the Vercel deployment configuration for the current project, ensuring environment variables are properly mapped.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Time-to-Value' over 'Feature-Completeness'; users pay for solved problems, not bloated interfaces.
Use Claude Code to write your integration tests first; it forces you to think about edge cases before the code is even written.
Leverage the Antigravity 'hot-reload' environment to iterate on UI changes in real-time, matching your design speed to your thought speed.
Always build with observability in mind; integrate logging early so you know exactly where your MVP is failing when real users arrive.
Treat your MVP as a 'disposable asset'; if it doesn't get traction in 30 days, use the Antigravity template to pivot to the next idea instantly.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up a feedback loop using a tool like PostHog or LogRocket to monitor user behavior and iterate based on actual data rather than assumptions.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for your portfolio and start building for your bottom line. The tools are ready, the architecture is proven, and your market is waiting. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
